Philosophy: Open-ended, non-linear activity sandbox governed by risk and reward rather than forced character-level gating.

CanonicalRules.Text: Players may engage in any available activity at any time, with no enforced progression sequence.
Higher risk activities must proportionally increase reward potential through loot quality, currency yield, or crafting material density.
Activities must explicitly define how death alters reward loss, loot exposure, and economic consequence.
Blessings function as a global risk mitigation modifier applied across all activity types.
The world is a sandbox of independent activity nodes governed by risk, reward, and encounter configuration rather than player level pathing.
Regions are not level-locked. All regions are accessible at any level, but naturally vary in danger, encounter density, and risk.
Activities are classified by qualitative risk tiers: Minimal, Low, Moderate, High, Extreme.
Exploration rewards are abstract and undefined pending future canonical Crafting Bible definition.
Boss encounters represent the highest complexity and reward tier, but do not define guaranteed death probability.

HUNT_ACTIVITIES.Purpose: Combat-driven resource acquisition, leveling, and rare item farming.
HUNT_ACTIVITIES.DeathExposure: Full (Subject to player corpse loot, linear blessing mitigation applied)

EXPLORATION_ACTIVITIES.Purpose: World discovery, cartography, and secret finding.
EXPLORATION_ACTIVITIES.EconomicOutput: Exploration rewards are abstract and undefined pending future canonical Crafting Bible definition.

QUEST_CONTRACT_ACTIVITIES.Purpose: Structured objective-based narrative and reputation progression.
QUEST_CONTRACT_ACTIVITIES.EconomicOutput: Medium-High (Faction reputation, direct coin rewards, material caches)
QUEST_CONTRACT_ACTIVITIES.DeathExposure: Variable (Dependent on target zone danger levels)

BOSS_WORLD_EVENT_ACTIVITIES.Purpose: Server-scale or multi-group cooperative high-tier challenges.
BOSS_WORLD_EVENT_ACTIVITIES.DeathExposure: Boss encounters represent the highest complexity and reward tier, but do not define guaranteed death probability. Boss rewards drop to a secure personal chest in safe zones rather than on corpse
